It is used to heat or cool the coolant in heating, hot water supply and industrial  • Principle of operation: Based on convection and conduction. The hot medium transfers heat to the wall, which in turn transfers it to the cold medium.processes, significantly increasing the energy efficiency of systems. • Principle of operation: Based on convection and conduction. subtitle: MODEL 300 PNEUMATIC BUTTERFLY VALVE
name: Model 300 - Pneumatic Butterfly Valve
fen_type: Double acting, Double acting without spring
aplication: EPDM-Suitable for steam and hot water,unsuitable for oils, greases, fuels, etc.
scheme: For a detailed diagram, please contact us if necessary.
table: For a detailed table, please contact us if necessary.
description: L'aria compressa fa ruotare la lama, aprendo e chiudendo la valvola. Il design esclusivo della valvola garantisce basse perdite di potenza e un'elevata efficienza.

subtitle: MODEL 121 ANGLE DIAPHRAGM VALVE
name: Model 121 - Angle Diaphragm Valve
aplication: Filtered compressed air or neutral gas
scheme: For a detailed diagram, please contact us if necessary.
table: For a detailed table, please contact us if necessary.
description: Il diaframma è posizionato tra il corpo valvola e il coperchio per isolare il fluido al posto della guarnizione dello stelo. La valvola rimane chiusa (aperta) grazie alla forza della molla in condizioni normali. Quando il pistone viene azionato dall'aria compressa, la valvola si apre (chiude). Nel tipo a doppio effetto, la valvola viene aperta e chiusa dall'aria compressa.

subtitle: PNEUMATIC ANGLE SEAT VALVE
name: Model BL 101 H - Pneumatic Angle Seat Valve
fen_type: Filtered compressed air or neutral gas
aplication: control of water, oil, air, liquids, organic solvents, acids and alkalis
scheme: For a detailed diagram, please contact us if necessary.
table: For a detailed table, please contact us if necessary.
description: Lightweight appearance, compact structure, and excellent performance. Y-shaped structure design of the valve body features high flow rate, low flow resistance, and rapid action response. Stainless steel actuator, better performance for harsh environments. Aspetto leggero, struttura compatta e prestazioni eccellenti. Il design a Y del corpo valvola offre elevata portata, bassa resistenza al flusso e risposta rapida. Attuatore in acciaio inossidabile, prestazioni migliori per ambienti difficili.

subtitle: MODEL 451A - PNEUMATIC BALL VALVE TYPE A
name: Model 451A - Valves-various equipment
aplication: control of liquid and gas media in industrial pneumatic systems
scheme: For a detailed diagram, please contact us if necessary.
table: For a detailed table, please contact us if necessary.
description: Double acting(Single-acting option is available upon request.)

subtitle: MODEL 451A - PNEUMATIC BALL VALVE TYPE A
name: Model 451D - Pneumatic Ball Valve Type D
material: Body & Bonnet: CF8 / CF8M, Ball: CF8 (304) / CF8M (316)
aplication: control of liquid and gas media in industrial pneumatic systems
scheme: For a detailed diagram, please contact us if necessary.
table: For a detailed table, please contact us if necessary.
description: Model 451D is a pneumatic ball valve Type D designed for reliable shut-off and flow control in liquid and gas applications. Constructed from stainless steel with PTFE sealing, it offers high pressure resistance up to PN63 (1000 Psi) and smooth 90° actuation. Supplied as standard in double-acting configuration, with single-acting option available.

subtitle: PNEUMATIC BALL VALVE TYPE D
name: Model 125 - Pneumatic Proportional Control Angle
material: Body: CF8 / CF8M / CF3M, Seal: PTFE, Actuator: Stainless steel
aplication: Pneumatic Proportional Control Angle Seat Valve / Valvola a sede angolata di controllo proporzionale pneumatico
scheme: For a detailed diagram, please contact us if necessary.
table: For a detailed table, please contact us if necessary.
description: Model 125 is a pneumatic proportional control angle seat valve for precise modulation of flow in liquids, steam, and gases. Stainless steel construction, PTFE seals, and proportional actuator allow smooth and accurate control in industrial automation systems. Operating pressure up to 16 bar, medium temperature up to +180°C.

subtitle: MODEL 508 - PNEUMATIC PROPORTIONAL CONTROL ANGLE SEAT VALVE
name: Model 508 - Wafer Type Disc Check Valve
aplication: prevent backflow of liquids, steam, or gas in piping systems
scheme: For a detailed diagram, please contact us if necessary.
table: For a detailed table, please contact us if necessary.
description: Model 508 is a wafer-type disc check valve for DN15–DN100 piping. Designed for nominal pressure up to PN40, temperature range -20°C to +300°C, flange connections per DIN and ANSI standards. Minimum opening pressure 35 mbar. Stainless steel construction with metal-to-metal seal ensures durability and reliable backflow prevention.

subtitle: PRODUCTION SERIES BMN 302
name: BMN 302 – Forward-Curved Centrifugal Fan for Equipment Cooling
aplication: extraction of clean or slightly dusty air, cooling of electrical cabinets, generators, motors, and industrial equipment
scheme: https://res.cloudinary.com/dpzs8insu/image/upload/v1772354115/BMN302photo_2026-03-01_09-45-11_eddejw.jpg
table: https://res.cloudinary.com/dpzs8insu/image/upload/v1772354089/BMN302_lok_photo_2026-03-01_09-45-52_mblplp.jpg
description: A series of forward-curved fans designed to achieve low pressures with low flow rates. The BMN series is particularly suitable for extracting clean or slightly dusty air and is widely used for heat dissipation from electrical. They are also widely used in the ventilation of boilers and small furnaces. cabinets, generator rooms, extruders, lamps, motors, etc.  The operating fluid temperature can reach +80°C in the standard version and up to +150°C in the SV version.   The impeller, made of galvanized steel sheet, is constructed with forward-curved blades (Sirocco type).   BMN series fans are standardly built in version 5, i.e., supplied without a motor support base. The standard motors used are B5 design with 2, 4, 6, or 8 poles.

subtitle: PRODUCTION SERIES MAP_SERIES
name: MAP Series - Industrial Centrifugal Fan
aplication: heat dissipation from lamps and motors, ventilation of boilers and small ovens, combustion air supply for gas burners
scheme: For a detailed diagram, please contact us if necessary.
table: For a detailed table, please contact us if necessary.
description: The MAP Series consists of forward-curved centrifugal fans designed for medium pressure and low airflow applications. Suitable for clean or slightly dusty air extraction, heat dissipation, boiler and furnace ventilation, and combustion air supply for gas burners. Available in standard and SV high-temperature versions.

subtitle: MA SERIES - RADIAL BLADE CENTRIFUGAL FAN
name: MA Series - Radial blade Centrifugal Fan
aplication: pneumatic conveying, dusty air transport, granular and filamentary materials, woodworking, paper processing, tanneries
scheme: For a detailed diagram, please contact us if necessary.
table: For a detailed table, please contact us if necessary.
description: The MA Series consists of centrifugal fans with flat radial blades, designed for medium-high pressure and medium airflow applications. Particularly suitable for pneumatic conveying of dusty air, granular materials, and, with modifications, filamentary materials. Widely used in woodworking, paper processing industries, and tanneries. Available in standard and high-temperature SV versions.

subtitle: PRODUCTION SERIES MB_SERIES
name: MB SERIES - Industrial Centrifugal Fan
aplication: Industrial ventilation and air conditioning, drying systems, paint shops, gas and vapor exhaust
scheme: For a detailed diagram, please contact us if necessary.
table: For a detailed table, please contact us if necessary.
description: The MB Series consists of forward-curved centrifugal fans designed for low-pressure, high-airflow applications. Suitable for clean or slightly dusty air extraction in industrial ventilation, HVAC systems, drying plants, paint shops, and gas and vapor exhaust installations. Available in standard and high-temperature SV versions, with multiple motor pole configurations.

subtitle: BACKWARD-CURVED CENTRIFUGAL FAN MAR_SERIES
name: MAR Series - Industrial Centrifugal Fan
aplication: clean or dusty air extraction, pneumatic conveying of granular materials (non-filamentary), fume and harmful gas exhaust
scheme: For a detailed diagram, please contact us if necessary.
table: For a detailed table, please contact us if necessary.
description: The MAR Series consists of high-efficiency backward-curved centrifugal fans designed for medium-high pressure and medium airflow applications. Suitable for clean or dusty air, pneumatic conveying of solid granular materials, and industrial exhaust of fumes and harmful gases. The specially shaped conical front disc ensures optimal inlet coupling and high aerodynamic efficiency.
